admin.enabled_help: Master switch — show the animated hero on the discussion list and every tag page.

studio.title: Title
studio.subtitle: Subtitle
studio.icon_help: Type any Font Awesome class — e.g. fas fa-dragon, fas fa-fire, fab fa-discord.
studio.border_width_help: 0 = no border. Leave empty for the default thin edge.
studio.margin_help: Space above the banner — set 0 to sit flush under the header.
studio.image_help: Optional. A full image URL shown instead of the gradient.
studio.height_help: Optional. Banner height in pixels (defaults to 150).
studio.stats_custom_help: Optional — leave empty to show LIVE stats automatically (the home hero shows forum totals: discussions, posts, members; a tag hero shows its discussion count). Add rows here only to override them with your own. Each row: a value, a Font Awesome icon, and a label.
